calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-12-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:05 a.m.: This cause comes on this day for Trial De Novo as previously scheduled; Respondent Sharon Smith appears in Propria Persona; Louis Duvernay, Esq. appears for Appellant Mary A. Bryant, who is also present this day.

10:10 a.m.: The Court hears oral testimony presented by both sides and receives, reads and reviews all documentary evidence that is presented this day until 10:35 a.m.

10:37 a.m.: After hearing all oral testimony and receiving all presented documentary evidence, the Court takes the matter under submission.

All parties are informed by the Court they will be notified of the Court's decision by mail.

10:38 a.m.: Court is adjourned.
